name_en: Top-tier original single replica exclusive photo📷【Go-14 Twist MM Handbag】M25046 22891 Black Gun-Clip
name_cn:
Top-tier original single replica exclusive photo📷【Go-14 Twist MM Handbag】M25046 22891 Black Gun-Clip
This Go-14 MM Malletage debuted at the 2024 Spring/Summer Fashion Show. The brand's historic Malletage quilted pattern is presented in luxurious quilted calfskin, paired with a polished gold LV Twist turn-lock, and features a detachable chain strap and detachable leather handle for different carrying styles.
Size: 23 x 16 x 10 cm
